source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 1. 2차 CE 인허가/Attachment 04. Risk Management Report/04-03. Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report (A-TCF-5-048).docx

document.title: Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Report defining basic safety, essential performance, monitoring method, and EMC pass/fail results for the ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Risk management and CE MDD technical documentation support for basic safety, essential performance, and EMC immunity/emission evaluation.
keyPoints: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using acquisition software.
Acquisition image is obtained as intended and should not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
EMC test standards listed in the report all show PASS results.
Specific immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.

concepts.name: Acquisition Software
concepts.evidence: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

concepts.name: Dark image evaluation
concepts.evidence: When acquiring a Dark image using Acquisition Software in the evaluation of the following criteria, there should be no problem with the image.

concepts.name: EMC immunity pass/fail criteria
concepts.evidence: Specific, detailed immunity pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management, for immunity with regard to em disturbances.

evidence.claim: The document is Report No. A-TCF-5-048 Rev.1.
The report was prepared, reviewed, and approved on APR/02/2021.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared R&D team Jung, Woosuk APR/02/2021 Review R&D Manager Lee, Dong jin APR/02/2021 Approval Quality Manager Hur Namkyu APR/02/2021

evidence.claim: Revision 1 dated APR/02/2021 revised the product name.
The document covers basic safety and essential performance of ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is basic safety, essential performance of the ADD.

evidence.claim: Product operation can be monitored using acquisition software.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

evidence.claim: The acquired image should be obtained as intended and should not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
evidence.evidenceText: - Acquisition image is obtained as intended. - The acquired image should not have two lines adjacent or be blank.

evidence.claim: During EMC testing, DC power is consistently supplied from the power supply.
evidence.evidenceText: - DC power is consistently supplied from POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.

evidence.claim: CISPR 11 conducted emission on AC mains port and radiated emission results were PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: CISPR 11 Conducted Emission on AC mains Port PASS Radiated Emission PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission on AC mains input port result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-2 Harmonic Current Emission on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-3 voltage fluctuations and flicker on AC mains input port result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-3 Voltage Fluctuations and Flicker on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-2 electrostatic discharge immunity result was PASS.
IEC 61000-4-3 radio-frequency electromagnetic field amplitude modulated immunity result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-3 Radio-frequency electromagnetic field Amplitude modulated Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-4 fast transients immunity result was PASS.
IEC 61000-4-5 surges immunity result was PASS.
IEC 61000-4-6 radio-frequency common mode immunity result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-6 Radio-frequency common mode Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-8 power frequency magnetic fields result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-8 Power frequency magnetic fields PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-11 voltage dips and voltage interruptions immunity result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-11 Voltage Dips, Voltage Interruptions Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: For immunity tests, essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected before, during, and after the test.
evidence.evidenceText: Before, during, and after the test, the essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected, and the performance degradation which does not affect essential performance and basic safety is PASS.

evidence.claim: Specific immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific, detailed immunity pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management, for immunity with regard to em disturbances. These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the risk management file
